creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to byronc from comment #3)
> Upstream confirms the problem and released the fix on 12/20/2020 as version: sane-backends-1.0.31-208
I see the commit to the master: https://gitlab.com/sane-project/backends/-/commits/master
but don't see the release: https://gitlab.com/sane-project/backends/-/releases
